issues.fix: Add a LegalService or LocalBusiness JSON-LD block with name, address, phone, and area served.

issues.title: Business schema fields
issues.detail: No business entity to evaluate fields on.
issues.fix: Add a LegalService or LocalBusiness block first, then populate name, address, telephone, and areaServed.

issues.title: No attorney / team page found
issues.detail: No attorney or team page was found. These pages carry the expertise and authorship signals search and AI weight.
issues.fix: Add an attorney/team page with each lawyer's bio, credentials, and Person schema.

issues.title: Direct-answer sentences
issues.detail: No direct-answer patterns detected. AI models prefer content that directly answers questions.
issues.fix: Include explicit definitional sentences. Example: "A power of attorney is a legal document that..."

issues.title: Canonical tag
issues.detail: Canonical points to a different page. Confirm that is intentional consolidation, not an error.
issues.fix: Set a self-referencing canonical unless this page is a deliberate duplicate of another.

issues.title: Page title
issues.detail: Too short (12 chars). Aim for 50-60 characters.
issues.fix: Expand the title to include your main keyword and a brief value proposition.

issues.title: Breadcrumb schema
issues.detail: Not found. Breadcrumb markup improves site hierarchy signals.
issues.fix: Add BreadcrumbList JSON-LD showing the page's position in your site structure.

issues.title: FAQPage schema
issues.detail: Not found. FAQ schema packages common questions for search and AI answer engines.
issues.fix: Add FAQPage structured data wrapping your most common client questions and answers.

issues.title: Review / Rating schema
issues.detail: Not found. Review schema can support star ratings in search results.
issues.fix: Add AggregateRating or Review schema for your client testimonials.

issues.title: Word count
issues.detail: 158 words. Very thin content signals low value.
issues.fix: Add substantive content: services, common questions, process.

issues.title: Practice-area intent
issues.detail: Content does not clearly state practice areas.
issues.fix: State the firm's practice areas plainly in headings and body copy.

issues.title: Mixed content
issues.detail: 1 HTTP resource on an HTTPS page.
issues.fix: Change all http:// resource URLs to https:// or use protocol-relative URLs.

issues.title: HTML document size
issues.detail: 954 KB. Oversized HTML slows rendering.
issues.fix: Reduce HTML size by externalising CSS/JS and removing unused markup.

issues.title: Meta description
issues.detail: Missing. This is the snippet Google shows in search results.
issues.fix: Add <meta name="description" content="..."> in your <head>. Write 120-160 characters describing what this page offers.

issues.title: Image alt text
issues.detail: 4 of 6 images (67%) missing alt text.
issues.fix: Add descriptive alt attributes to every tag. Describe what the image shows.

issues.title: HSTS header
issues.detail: Present but max-age is low (15552000s). Recommended: at least 31536000.
issues.fix: Set Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains.

issues.title: Content-to-HTML ratio
issues.detail: 0% text content. Very code-heavy page.
issues.fix: Add substantive text content.

issues.title: Server-rendered content
issues.detail: Some important content may depend on JavaScript: 112 words in server HTML; 26 external scripts.
issues.fix: Verify the page in a rendered browser and ensure key headings, service copy, phone numbers, and CTAs are present in the initial HTML or otherwise reliably crawlable.

issues.title: Render-blocking resources
issues.detail: 6 render-blocking resources in <head>.
issues.fix: Defer scripts and load non-critical stylesheets asynchronously.

issues.title: AI training bot control
issues.detail: No training-only crawlers blocked. Your content may be used to train AI models.
issues.fix: Add Disallow rules for GPTBot, CCBot, and Bytespider in robots.txt if you want to control AI training use.

issues.title: llms.txt file
issues.detail: Not found. An emerging, optional file that summarises your site for AI models.
issues.fix: Optionally add a /llms.txt with a short Markdown summary of your site and key URLs. Low priority.

issues.title: Open Graph tags
issues.detail: Partial (2/3). Missing: og:description.
issues.fix: Add the missing tags: og:description.

issues.title: Heading hierarchy
issues.detail: Heading levels are skipped (for example H1 then H3).
issues.fix: Use sequential heading levels without skipping.

issues.title: Anchor text quality
issues.detail: 1 link with generic text.
issues.fix: Replace "click here" and "learn more" with descriptive text.

issues.title: Redirect chain
issues.detail: 1 redirect hop before the final page.
issues.fix: Point internal links at the final URL so visitors and crawlers skip the redirects.

issues.title: H2 subheadings
issues.detail: No H2 tags. Subheadings help structure content for readers and crawlers.
issues.fix: Add H2 tags to break your content into scannable sections.

issues.title: Third-party scripts
issues.detail: 5 external script domains.
issues.fix: Audit third-party scripts. Remove unused ones and defer the rest.
